10.3 - Continuous 60-Day Recertifications 
(Rev. 265, Issued: 01-10-20, Effective: 01-01-20, Implementation: 02-11-20) 

While HH PPS payment is now made for each 30-day period, the home health PPS 
permits continuous 60-day recertifications for patients who continue to be eligible for the 
home health benefit. Medicare does not limit the number of continuous 60-day 
recertifications for beneficiaries who continue
